use_cases: Display product or service ratings with partial star fill support
Show user review scores in e-commerce product listings
Render aggregate rating summaries in dashboards
Display feedback scores in review or rating components
Show author or content ratings in media applications
ai_summary: A lightweight React star rating icon component from the Untitled UI design system that supports partial star fills using SVG clipping and a progress prop. The component uses Tailwind CSS for styling with a warning-amber color scheme, rendering scalable star icons that can represent any rating value between 0-100%. Perfect for displaying product reviews, user feedback scores, or any star-based rating system in e-commerce platforms, SaaS dashboards, or media applications.
